subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath shed His splendour upon all created things through His Name, which He hath made the Sovereign of all names when seated upon the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان من تجلی علی الممکنات باسمه الذی جعله سلطان الاسماء اذ استقر علی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @call to action, @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
